package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_select_star_on_hot_query: Layer: Database access. Flag SELECT * in hot queries where narrow projections reduce scan and decode cost.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule527NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario527Negative(records []Rule527NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
